evidence_hint: src/inventory.ts:330 writeSidecar `catch { /* unwritable — recorded in manifest only */ }` and inventory.ts:349 writeFolderSidecar same; inventory.ts:304 swallows injectFile failure. Run returns success and manifest lists the record regardless of whether the sidecar was written.
residual_if_not_resolved: Capture the write failure into the record/unknowns (push sidecar_write_failed:<path>:<err>) and surface a non-silent status; don't treat an unwritable target as success.
